tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: It is the longest river in the United Kingdom and flows through the English town of Shrewsbury.
This is the highest mountain in Africa, a snow-capped peak rising above the plains of Tanzania.
It is the largest lake in Great Britain by surface area and lies in the Scottish Highlands.
This long South American river carries more water than any other river on Earth.
It is the highest mountain on Earth, standing on the border between Nepal and China.
This deep Russian lake holds more fresh water than any other lake in the world.
It is the longest river in the world and flows north through Egypt to the Mediterranean Sea.
This is the highest mountain in the Alps, found on the border of France and Italy.
It is the largest lake in Africa and the main source of the river mentioned in this task as the longest.
This is the largest desert in the world, covering much of northern Africa.
It is the deepest ocean trench on the planet, lying in the western Pacific.
This city is the capital of Italy and stands on the banks of the Tiber.
